 Place of service 
(POS) variables Description Data Source 

pos_er % of line items delivered in emergency room (ER) Claims 

pos_nursing % of line items delivered in nursing facility or skilled nursing facility Claims 

pos_asc % of line items delivered in ambulatory surgery center (ASC) Claims 

pos_resid % of line items delivered in the patient’s residence (i.e., home, assisted 
living facility, custodial care facility, or group home) Claims 

pos_other % of line items delivered in other
